tool_args.hypothesis: A misspelled public transferFromm bypasses allowance checks and lets anyone transfer tokens from arbitrary addresses to attacker.

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "target_function": "transferFromm", "hypothesis": "A misspelled public transferFromm bypasses allowance checks and lets anyone transfer tokens from arbitrary addresses to attacker."}

tool_args.exploit_logic: Call transferFromm to move tokens from a victim address into attacker without proper allowance checks—contract likely implements transferFromm that doesn't check allowances or authorization. The test will mint tokens to victim (via transfer from owner or initial supply), then call transferFromm as attacker and assert attacker received tokens.

tool_args.evidence: forge test passed PoC: calling transferFromm as attacker moved tokens from victim to attacker without allowance checks. See test output where attacker balance increased and victim decreased.
